metadata.objetivo: Extrair trechos de código reais para validação humana

supabase_queries.trecho_codigo:
.from('case_metrics')
          .select('*')
          .eq('veterinarian_id', userId)
          .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
          .limit(1);

.from('weekly_stats')
          .select('*')
          .eq('veterinarian_id', userId)
          .order('week_start', { ascending: true })
          .limit(7);

.from('users')
    .select(
      'id, name, email, role, specialty, crmv, institution, avatar, ' +
      'total_cases, success_rate, avg_precision, monthly_procedures, preferences'
    )

.from('certifications')
    .select('id, title, issuer, year, verified')
    .eq('user_id', userId)
    .order('year', { ascending: false })
    .returns<CertRow[]>();

await supabase.from('users').upsert(
    {
      id:           supaUser.id,
      email:        supaUser.email ?? null,
      name,

.from('clinical_cases')
      .select('*')
      .eq('veterinarian_id', user.id)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .then(({ data, error }) => {

.from('notifications')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', user.id)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .then(({ data }) => {

supabase.from('clinical_cases').insert({
      id:              enriched.id,
      title:           enriched.title,
      patient_name:    enriched.patientName,
      species:         enriched.species,

const { error: profileErr } = await supabase.from('users').upsert({
        id:          data.user.id,
        name:        form.name.trim(),
        email:       form.email.trim(),
        crmv:        (form.role === 'veterinarian' || form.role === 'resident') ? form.crmv.trim() : '',

await supabase.from('users').upsert({
                    id: data.user.id,
                    name: form.name.trim(),
                    email: form.email.trim(),
                    role: 'student',

.from('reports')
          .select('*')
          .eq('user_id', user.id)
          .order('generated_at', { ascending: false });

.from('kpi_metrics')
          .select('*')
          .eq('user_id', user.id)
          .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
          .limit(4);

.from('weekly_stats')
          .select('*')
          .eq('user_id', user.id)
          .order('week_start', { ascending: true })
          .limit(7);

main().catch(console.error);
